summary: Repair approval audit scope migration owner handling for cloud production.

notes: Keeps the V0.18.26 approval audit scope feature set.
Updates function owner assignment to support production databases without a postgres role.
The migration uses postgres when available and falls back to psa_admin.
No additional frontend behavior changes beyond V0.18.26.
The production bundle is rebuilt with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.27.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.27.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.27.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.27.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql on the cloud host after deployment.
known_warnings: V0.18.26 reached the cloud app container but its 127 migration failed before commit because production has no postgres role.
Unit test command currently exits successfully with no matching test files.
